title: Deterministic Model Port, Scripted Fake, Recordings, and Test Identity · Contract Workshop
summary: A public-interest product team incrementally builds scripted provider fake and versioned interaction fixture set from original fixed provider, interaction, tool, approval, evaluation, and failure fixtures while retaining prior Python, HTTP, prompt, loop, security, accessibility, testing, and recovery requirements. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of scripted provider fake and versioned interaction fixture set while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress throu…
objectives: Express model requests, typed steps, usage, errors, cancellation, and async lifecycle through a minimal Python protocol.
Build a scripted fake that consumes expected requests and emits deterministic model output, tool calls, safety blocks, usage, and faults.
Store sanitized versioned provider fixtures with schema, model, API, SDK, timestamp, purpose, and explicit replay limits.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Commit to the mission model · Workshop Model Protocol
steps.instruction:
workshop case — A workshop agent engineering team handles case 5758 during an accessible public-service intake assistant. Build deterministic Python evidence to define a provider port, scripted fake, versioned recordings, request identity, and deterministic no-live default; loops, concurrency, tokens, time, retries, and spend stay below explicit budgets; then change one eval case, rubric, model version, token price, rate limit, or latency distribution and rerun release gates. Browser code uses pure bounded state machines and original fixed fixtures only. Real provider APIs, Gemini models, google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic native validation, HTTP, files, credentials, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, privacy review, and production effects require explicit controlled transfer gates.

workshop case — A workshop agent engineering team handles case 8996 during a keyboard and screen-reader interaction review. Build deterministic Python evidence to define a provider port, scripted fake, versioned recordings, request identity, and deterministic no-live default; sensitive actions require a trustworthy user approval bound to exact arguments; then replace trusted context with untrusted indirect instructions and preserve data-versus-instruction boundaries. Browser code uses pure bounded state machines and original fixed fixtures only. Real provider APIs, Gemini models, google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic native validation, HTTP, files, credentials, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, privacy review, and production effects require explicit controlled transfer gates. steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Workshop No Live Default
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: agentpy-no-live-default-1cjv48" that uses case 5309 to define a provider port, scripted fake, versioned recordings, request identity, and deterministic no-live default. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not contact provider APIs, invoke Gemini models, import or claim native google-genai, google-adk, or Pydantic behavior, open sockets, read or write host files, use credentials, execute generated code, launch browsers, reach databases or telemetry backends, or claim live privacy, load, safety, cost, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, google-genai 2.11.0, google-adk 2.4.0, Pydantic 2.13.4, fixed provider fixtures, fake transports, controlled local services, disposable cloud projects, representative eval sets, accessibility, privacy and security review, load, canary, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

Evidence target: Safe AI agents and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Workshop No Live Default.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns No Live Default into observable performance evidence. For Safe AI agents and Python Extend the cumulative artifact · Workshop No Live Default, keep No Live Default connected to executable Python model, interaction, tool, policy, state, approval, evaluation, security, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-no-live-default-1cjv48
# Competency: agentpy-no-live-default.
# Case 5309: a controlled support-operations rehearsal.
# Operating constraint: last valid checkpoint, audit trail, kill switch, and rollback path must survive failure.
# Changed case: change model capability, API version, schema, or provider state and revalidate the adapter.
def evidence_agentpy_no_live_default_1cjv48(scripted_turns: int = 18, replayed_turns: int = 18, fixture_versions: int = 3, leaked_live_calls: int = 0, unexplained_differences: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_1cjv48 = "1cjv48-84vjc1-5309"
    assert evidence_variant_1cjv48
    evidence_axes_1cjv48 = (
        "authority1cjv48",
        "interaction5309",
        "tool84vjc1",
        "state1cjv485309",
        "evaluation53091cjv48",
        "recovery84vjc15309",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_1cjv48)) == 6
    if scripted_turns < 8 or replayed_turns < 0:
        return False, replayed_turns, "fake-depth"
    if replayed_turns != scripted_turns:
        return False, replayed_turns, "replay-gap"
    if fixture_versions < 2 or unexplained_differences > 0:
        return False, fixture_versions, "fixture-drift"
    if leaked_live_calls > 0:
        return False, leaked_live_calls, "live-call-leak"
    assert replayed_turns == scripted_turns and leaked_live_calls == 0
    return True, replayed_turns, "deterministic-model-port"
